name: Sherry's Not Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 5 medium potatoes, peeled and cut into random sizes
5 tbsp Your favorite beef broth or miso broth
1 tbsp garlic powder or 2 cloves garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the peas in a large pot or Dutch oven.
2. Add water enough to cover the ingredients by 1 inch at the top of the pot.
3. Cover and cook over very low heat for approximately 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the peas and cook an additional 15 minutes (Times may vary; sometimes I forget to turn off the heat and the flavor improves as it sits and barely steams).
